name: fetch_standings
description: Fetch and display World Cup 2026 group standings as a ranked table.

params.description: Fetch and display World Cup 2026 group standings as a ranked table.

view.description: Always 'table' for standings, or 'stat' on error.

title.description: Heading: 'World Cup 2026 – Group X Standings' or error title.

data.description: For table view: {columns, rows}. For stat view: {value, label, sub}.

summary.description: One-sentence summary with group leader and points, or error explanation.

steps: Build columns: Team, P, W, D, L, GF, GA, GD, Pts
Return table view with leader summary
